basic_details.job_title: MPEZ Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 72 Graduate & Technical Apprentice Posts
basic_details.short_information: MPEZ Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 72 vacancies across Madhya Pradesh. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MPEZ website, mpez.co.in.
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice & Technical (Diploma) Apprentice (under Apprentices Act, 1961)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (Application form to be downloaded from www.mpez.co.in and submitted by post or in person) + Mandatory NATS portal registration

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical / Civil / IT / CSE), B.Com., or Diploma (Electrical / Civil Engineering) from a Government-recognized institution, passed between 2022 and 2026.

selection_process: Merit-based on aggregate percentage marks in qualifying degree/diploma + Medical fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in offline mode. Applications submitted before 25-05-2026 or after 25-06-2026 (5:30 PM) will not be accepted. Before applying, candidates must mandatorily register and complete 100% profile on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) and obtain a valid Apprentice Registration Number. Detailed instructions for Registration, Profile Completion, and Apply for Establishment are available at https://nats.education.gov.in/assets/manual/student_manual.pdf.
seo_tags: Madhya Pradesh Poorv Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company Apprentices Recruitment 2026
